summary: Matched and linked the common item food object by fixing itFoods_Logic18_Spawned and updating related symbols/prototypes. The PR moved melee/it/items/itfoods.c from NonMatching to Matching, corrected the foods state table symbol, adjusted item-var signedness and it_80273318's signature, and updated GALE01 symbol visibility/local labels. decomp.dev reported one new match, itFoods_Logic18_Spawned reaching 100%, with +120 matched code bytes, +1208 linked code bytes, and +104 linked data bytes.

key_files.role: Main matching change: fixed itFoods_Logic18_Spawned codegen, moved it/inlines.h include into the C file, renamed the foods ItemStateTable symbol to it_803F5DB0, changed getRandMax to inline u32 getRandMax(Article*), and removed the obsolete third argument from it_80273318 call.
Changed melee/it/items/itfoods.c from Object(NonMatching) to Object(Matching).
Updated symbol scope/linkage: itFoods_UnkMotion* callbacks became global, while several data/sdata/sdata2 constants became local @ labels.
Changed itFoods_ItemVars.x0 and heal_amount from s32 to u32.
Removed unused third parameter from it_80273318 implementation.
Updated it_80273318 prototype to Item_GObj*, HSD_Joint*.
Updated an existing it_80273318 caller to the two-argument signature; bot noted a tiny percentage regression in this still-unmatched unit.
Removed it/inlines.h include from the public foods header.

what_changed: Marked melee/it/items/itfoods.c as Matching in configure.py.
Matched itFoods_Logic18_Spawned by replacing static s32 getRandMax(Item*) with inline u32 getRandMax(Article*) and calling it with ip->xC4_article_data.
Removed PAD_STACK(8) from itFoods_Logic18_Spawned and introduced a local temp assigned from rand before indexing attr[temp].x4 for the it_80273318 call.
Changed it_80273318 from a three-argument function to a two-argument function because the implementation only uses Item_GObj* and HSD_Joint* to set item->xC8_joint.
Updated callers in itfoods.c and it_2E5A.c to stop passing dummy/cast third arguments to it_80273318.
Corrected itFoods_ItemVars fields x0 and heal_amount to u32, matching the unsigned use of the random food index and heal amount storage.
Renamed the foods item state table in source from it_803F83F0 to it_803F5DB0.
Changed itFoods_UnkMotion0/1/2/3 Anim/Phys/Coll symbols from local to global in GALE01 symbols, consistent with linkage from the state table/source.
Demoted several unnamed data constants from global address-style symbols to local @ labels in symbols.txt, including @165, @163, @164, @175, and @176.
Moved the it/inlines.h dependency out of itfoods.h and into itfoods.c.
smart_moves: The helper signature change from Item* to Article* avoided an extra dereference shape in the helper and better matched the call site that already has ip->xC4_article_data.
Using u32 for getRandMax and itFoods_ItemVars aligned type information with HSD_Randi bounds/index storage and avoided signedness-driven codegen differences.
Removing the unused third parameter from it_80273318 cleaned up a misleading prototype and eliminated forced dummy arguments at call sites.

The temporary variable in itFoods_Logic18_Spawned is a small but targeted codegen tactic: preserving rand into temp before attr[temp].x4 can influence register/index selection without changing behavior.
The PR paired source matching with linker metadata cleanup, so the object could be flipped to Matching rather than just improving one function locally.
Demoting anonymous constants to local @ labels kept the symbol table closer to actual visibility instead of over-exporting address-named data.
decomp_lessons: When a function's extra parameter is unused in the body, check whether the prototype is overfit to old call-site guesses; removing it may improve caller matches and clean up casts.
For item data selected by HSD_Randi, unsigned struct fields and helper return types can matter for matching because they affect extension/sign instructions.
Do not leave public headers carrying inline-only includes unless users need them; move inline dependencies to the C file that actually uses them.
State-table callback functions may need global symbol visibility even when they look like local per-item motion callbacks, because linker-visible data tables reference them.
Matching a final function often requires coordinating source, headers, symbol scopes, and configure.py status in one PR.
Bot metrics can reveal side effects outside the target unit: this PR matched itfoods but slightly changed the unmatched it_2E5A percentage after the shared prototype cleanup.
naming_conventions: Food item logic functions use the itFoods_Logic18_* pattern, e.g. itFoods_Logic18_Spawned, PickedUp, Dropped, and EvtUnk.
Food item state callbacks use itFoods_UnkMotionN_Anim, itFoods_UnkMotionN_Phys, and itFoods_UnkMotionN_Coll.
Unidentified global objects can remain address-named, such as it_803F5DB0 for the foods ItemStateTable, when no semantic name is established.
Anonymous/local constants in symbols.txt should use @NNN local labels instead of global it_ address names when they are not exported.
Shared item functions in it_2725 keep address-style names such as it_80273318 until a better semantic name is known.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Changed getRandMax to inline u32 getRandMax(Article* article) so it directly reads article->x4_specialAttributes and returns attr->x0.
Removed PAD_STACK(8), indicating the final match no longer needed manual stack padding once types/helper shape were corrected.
Introduced s32 temp; temp = rand; before attr[temp].x4 to influence generated indexing/register behavior in itFoods_Logic18_Spawned.
Removed obsolete third-argument setup from it_80273318 calls, reducing caller-side instruction noise.
Adjusted symbol visibility in config/GALE01/symbols.txt so state-table callback references link as globals while unrelated constants remain local.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the provided slice.
decomp.dev bot reported: Matched code 55.29% (+120 bytes), Linked code 31.85% (+1208 bytes), Linked data 29.18% (+104 bytes).
decomp.dev bot reported one new match: main/melee/it/items/itfoods itFoods_Logic18_Spawned improved from 93.33% to 100.00%.
decomp.dev bot also reported one regression in an unmatched item: main/melee/it/items/it_2E5A it_802E6380 changed from 58.27% to 58.23% with 0 byte delta.
follow_up_queries: Find other item functions calling it_80273318 with stale dummy arguments or commented-out third-argument guesses.
Search for item var structs using signed fields for random indices or nonnegative attribute values that may need u32 for matching.
Check other ItemStateTable callback symbols still marked local in config/GALE01/symbols.txt despite being referenced from linkable data.
Look for public item headers that include it/inlines.h only for one implementation file.
Compare other food/item spawned logic functions where PAD_STACK remains and a helper signature/type cleanup might remove it.
